name: Observer Ward
description: A form of half-sentient plant, often cultivated by apprentice wizards.

abilities.name: Plant
abilities.description: Plants an invisible and phased Observer Ward at the target location, which grants ground vision around it. Cooldown: 1. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 500. Vision Radius: 1600. Ward Duration: 360. Hero Hit Count: 2. The player that placed the ward can always attack it with any of their units. However, all their attacks are treated as non-hero attacks, until the ward comes within the 50% deny range.
